declarations.comments: Represents a non-negative whole Number ℕ₀
declarations.title: Nat

declarations.comments: Represents Successor of a Nat: `(Succ a) ^= 1 + a`
declarations.title: Succ

children.comments:
reflect typelevel Nat to a valuelevel Int


```purescript
reflectNat (Proxy  :: _ D10) = 10
reflectNat (NProxy :: _ D10) = 10
```

declarations.comments:
```purescript
> powNat d2 d3
8 -- : NProxy D8
```
a raised to the power of b `a^b = c`
declarations.title: powNat
